Bob Dylan
War Memorial Arena
Oncenter Complex
Syracuse, New York

18. If Dogs Run Free
19. Honest With Me

Concert # 1375 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 27 of the 2001 US Fall Tour. 2001 concert # 98.
Concert # 280 with the 12th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Charlie Sexton (guitar), Larry Campbell
(guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), David Kemper (drums & percussion).

2 Larry Campbell (fiddle).
10 Larry Campbell (bouzouki).
1, 4, 20 Larry Campbell & Charlie Sexton (backup vocals).

Stereo audience recording, 125 minutes.
